headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Lam Research (LRCX) After Its 184% One Year Surge
summary: If you are wondering whether Lam Research shares still offer value after such a strong run, or if you are late to the story, this article will walk through what the current price might be implying. The stock last closed at US$222.99, with returns of 20.5% year to date and 184.2% over the past year, even after a 10.6% pullback over the last 7 days and a 6.1% decline over the past month. Recent market attention on Lam Research has largely centered on broader enthusiasm for semiconductor...

headline: Here Is Why Lam Research (LRCX) Is Highly Favored By Billionaires
summary: Lam Research Corp. (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the 15 best stocks to invest in according to billionaires. On February 3, Argus increased the firm’s price target on Lam Research Corp. (NASDAQ:LRCX) to $280 from $175. The firm maintained its Buy rating on the stock following the second-quarter results that exceeded expectations. The stock offers a […]
